lock_window_change.before: run_stable_runtime_launcher_attempt held serialized_lock across generated-config preparation and the full launcher subprocess
lock_window_change.after: run_stable_runtime_launcher_attempt holds a dedicated launcher procedure lock across the launcher subprocess and uses serialized_lock only for the short generated-config mutation section

correctness_invariant: generated stable runtime config is still materialized under serialized_lock before launcher handoff is updated
launcher subprocess still runs under one dedicated launcher procedure lock so concurrent launcher attempts cannot stomp each other
shared mutation lock semantics for sync and other owner paths remain unchanged
forbidden_next_moves: claim live selector success from unit tests alone
bundle UI work into this runtime fix contour
